content: how much social security did I pay last month
Okay, I can help you with that. To calculate how much you paid for social security last month, can you please confirm which month you're asking about?

Okay, John. I see that for the pay period ending January 14, 2026, and paid on January 16, 2026, you paid $223.51 in Social Security tax. For the pay period ending January 28, 2026, and paid on January 30, 2026, you paid $223.51 in Social Security tax. Would you like me to calculate the total?
I got a pay increase this year, how much has my pay check increase

Okay, John. I can help you with that. Your gross pay in December 2025 was $3,500.00, and your gross pay in January 2026 was $3,605.00. This means your gross pay increased by $105.00 per pay period. Your net pay in December 2025 was $2173.10, and your net pay in January 2026 was $2242.80. This means your net pay increased by $69.70 per pay period.
How much is my health insurance cost?
Okay, John. I see a health insurance deduction of $150.00 on each of your paychecks. This is labeled as "healthInsuranceDeduction".
did the amount increase this year?
No, John, the amount you pay for health insurance has not increased this year. It was $150 in December 2025, and it is still $150 in January 2026.
what is the extra tax I have to pay as a result of my pay increase?
what is the extra tax I have to pay as a result of my pay increase?

Okay, John. I can help you with that.

In December 2025, your federal tax was $480.15, your state tax was $254.00, your social security tax was $217.00, and your medicare tax was $50.75.

In January 2026, your federal tax was $494.55, your state tax was $261.62, your social security tax was $223.51, and your medicare tax was $52.27.

This means that your federal tax increased by $14.40, your state tax increased by $7.62, your social security tax increased by $6.51, and your medicare tax increased by $1.52.
